meaning: 萨沃纳[意大利西北部港市]
examples: The storm caused landslides and flooding in Savona.
He returned to Milan, only to be directed towards Savona.
Winter cruises to Civitavecchia depart from Savona and Genoa, Italy and Barcelona.
Mayor Lea Savona said the town no longer belonged to the mafia and urged those who still formed part of the structure to hand themselves in.
